Scenarios.Question: Find tickets that have more than 3 attachments.

CorrectAnswer.SQL: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TicketAttachments a WHERE a.TicketId = t.Id) > 3

Scenarios.Question: Which user has resolved the most tickets in the last 30 days?

CorrectAnswer.SQL: SELECT u.FullName, COUNT(*) as ResolvedCount FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON u.Id = t.ResolvedByUserId WHERE t.ResolvedAt >= DATEADD(day, -30, GETUTCDATE()) GROUP BY u.Id, u.FullName ORDER BY ResolvedCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me the latest 5 comments for tickets in the Finance department.

CorrectAnswer.SQL: SELECT TOP 5 c.Content, c.CreatedAt, t.TicketNumber FROM TicketComments c JOIN Tickets t ON c.TicketId = t.Id JOIN Entities e ON t.EntityId = e.Id WHERE e.Name = 'Finance' ORDER BY c.CreatedAt DESC
